rationale.R1.7: Audited the citations and flagged one likely mis-attribution plus a substantial set of missing references.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (novelty claim is unverified).
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly within scope with some drifts (missing citation: generative-agent architecture, adaptation-gap figure).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (mis-attribution and missing citations).
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability (uncited ACS data, downscaling product).
